rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
generic_rules: Maintain component type contracts in type scopes and implementation contracts in implementation scopes
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope; do not invent declarations
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
Use `guarantee "label": expression;` for output dependency contracts in type scope
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees that refer to component ports in invalid scopes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not invent declarations for unresolved references; use exact visible identifiers
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
